propositions: A loader reads trusted-environment public keys pinned out-of-band in .rebar/trusted_environments.yaml on the review-gated code branch, not the auto-pushed tickets branch.
An absent config file yields 'no required environment', making op-cert enforcement opt-in and off by default.
A per-gate require_environment names one env_id whose environment must produce the certificate.
The required-environment check verifies signatures against the pinned key for the env_id, never the certificate's self-claimed keyid.
A certificate from an environment not in the pinned set, or one whose signature does not verify against the pinned key, fails the check.
A keyid-spoof certificate claiming a pinned env but signed by a different key must fail.
